name: 強制親吻/阻止親吻
description: 婚禮上「新郎親吻新娘」的環節，女主阻止並化解尷尬，既製造曖昧張力又強調兩人的假婚姻本質。
tags: 眾人注視下的親密動作與拒絕的對比

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Now, the groom may kiss the bride. Don't. What are you doing? / Sorry everyone. I just wanted to save the French kiss for the bedroom.
examples.context: 眾人注視下的親密動作與拒絕的對比
